query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'pipeline_runs' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'video%' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user By5XkGQEgEMb8WB.3b48d8604568 --database iRMuHk7nYQvS4BtpbvEbBz --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'pipeline_runs' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'video%' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE
videoUrl	text
videoBrief	text
videoBriefReview	json
videoStage	varchar(64)
videoBriefOptions	json
videoSourceType	enum('competitor','winning_ad')
videoDuration	int
videoStyleConfig	json
videoUploadUrl	text
videoFunnelStage	enum('cold','warm','retargeting','retention')
videoArchetypes	json
